nodes.bios: My name is Grace Till and I initiated in my fall quarter of my first year at UCI. In my free time I love to read, run, and roller skate! A fun fact about myself is that I have 14 goldfish that are over two years old and they live in big pickle jar. Ask me about interesting podcasts, books and/or my internship at recruitment :)
